vocab.meaning: một lối thoát/cách giải tỏa hữu ích
vocab.example: Photography serves as a productive outlet for my creativity, allowing me to document the beauty of everyday life.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào điều gì đó
vocab.example: I love to immerse myself in historical novels because they provide a deep escape from the modern world.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui từ việc gì
vocab.example: I derive immense pleasure from gardening, as there is something uniquely satisfying about nurturing a plant from seed to bloom.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi nhịp sống
vocab.example: Going for a hike on the weekends offers a much-needed change of pace from my sedentary office job.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó thôi nghĩ về (những lo lắng/căng thẳng)
vocab.example: Playing the piano really helps to keep my mind off the pressures of my upcoming exams.

vocab.meaning: trở nên cực kỳ đam mê điều gì đó (thường là bất ngờ)
vocab.example: I was bitten by the travel bug after my first trip abroad, and now I spend all my savings on exploring new countries.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu một sở thích mới
vocab.example: I decided to take up pottery last year to challenge myself with a more hands-on, tactile hobby.

vocab.meaning: mải mê đến mức quên hết xung quanh
vocab.example: It is so easy to lose oneself in a complex jigsaw puzzle for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: một người hâm mộ cuồng nhiệt của...
vocab.example: As an avid fan of classical cinema, I frequently attend screenings at the local independent theater.
While I wouldn't call it a passion, I find that solving Sudoku puzzles is an excellent way to pass the time during long commutes.
